title: LongLongJourneys
description: A modpack for epic adventures! Includes endless mobs, structures, items, and mechanics to learn.
body:
# ABOUT 
LongLongJourneys is designed primarily with exploration in mind. This modpack are for those who want to take time exploring structures, learning new game mechanics, discovering items, and encountering new mobs (including bosses).

# FEATURES 
Here are the comprehensive list of mods categorized for what they add:

<sup> Notes: Some mods overlap in what they add. 
Not all mods are listed (Mostly utility and libraries). <sup>

### 1. Structures
- [Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns) (With [Ancient city overhaul](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns-ancient-city-overhaul))
- [Dungeons Now Loading](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeon-now-loading/versions)
- [Knight Quest](https://modrinth.com/mod/knight-quest/versions) 
- [Marium's Soulslike Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/mariums-soulslike-weaponry) 
- [Structory](https://modrinth.com/datapack/structory)
- [Stellarity](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/stellarity) (For the end dimension)
- [Incendium](https://modrinth.com/datapack/incendium) (For the nether dimension)
- [Yung's Better Series](https://www.curseforge.com/members/yungnickyoung/projects) <sub> 1 <sub>
- [CTOV](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village)
- [Hopo Better Underwater Ruins](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hopo-better-underwater-ruins)
### 2. Mobs
- [AdventureZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/adventurez)
- [Mobs of Mythology](https://modrinth.com/mod/mobs-of-mythology)
- [Wildlife](https://modrinth.com/mod/wildlife-fabric)
- [Marium’s Soulslike Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/mariums-soulslike-weaponry)
- [Knight Quest](https://modrinth.com/mod/knight-quest)
### 3. Equipment
- [Artifacts](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts)
- [Extra Alchemy](https://modrinth.com/mod/extraalchemy)
- [Gliders](https://modrinth.com/mod/gliders) (For transport)
- [Small Ships](https://modrinth.com/mod/small-ships) (For transport)
- [Tide](https://modrinth.com/mod/tide) (Fishing)
- [Progressive Archery](https://modrinth.com/mod/progressive-archery)
- [Scout](https://modrinth.com/mod/scout) (Pockets and Satchels)
- [Traveler's Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack/versions)
- [Hex Casting](https://modrinth.com/mod/hex-casting) (Magic system)
- [Knight Quest](https://modrinth.com/mod/knight-quest)
- [Marium’s Soulslike Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/mariums-soulslike-weaponry)

### 4. Ambience
- [Effective](https://modrinth.com/mod/effective)
- [Euphonium](https://modrinth.com/mod/euphonium)

### 5. Optimization

Sodium, BetterGrassify, Iris Shaders, Entity Culling, Ferrite Core, Immediately fast, More Culling, Memory Leak Fix, Krypton, Enhanced Block Entities, C2ME, Particle Core, Starlight, Noisium, bad optimizations, modern fix, and Distant Horizons (Nightly Build).

### 6. Notable Others
- [End Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/endrem/versions) (Overhauls end progression)
- [Terrestria](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrestria) (Biomes)
- [Continents](https://modrinth.com/mod/continents) (World gen)
- [Spelunkery](https://modrinth.com/mod/spelunkery) (Cave overhaul)
- [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) (Combat overhaul)
- [Antique Atlas 4](https://modrinth.com/mod/antique-atlas-4) (World Navigation)
- [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones)
- [Farmer’s Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) (Food)
- [Euphoria Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/euphoria-patches) for the added Complementary shaders.
# System Requirements
#### CPU - Ryzen 5 1600AF or Equivalent <sub>2
#### RAM - 4 GB Allocated (Minimum), 6 GB  Allocated (Recommended)<sub> 2

# Notes
1. Except for YUNG's better end island, Better Strongholds, and Better Witch Huts mostly because of incompatibility with Stellarity.
2. Based on personal testing with Complementary Shaders on Potato profile.

# Special thanks
Special thanks for the hardworking mod creators that made this modpack possible. I made sure to add hyperlinks (excluding optimization mods) so you can check out their mod page here on modrinth!
